title: Caryophyllus acutangulus
taxonomy: Caryophyllus acutangulus is classified as a species within the genus Caryophyllus. However, Caryophyllus is now considered a synonym of Dianthus, thus placing Caryophyllus acutangulus within the Dianthus genus. The family to which Caryophyllus acutangulus belongs is Caryophyllaceae, commonly known as the pink or carnation family. This classification places it within the Caryophyllales order and the Angiospermophyta division of flowering plants. Caryophyllus acutangulus is a type of flowering plant that is native to the Mediterranean region.
